_comment: Widget Contracts — every widget MUST satisfy these visual baselines. Enforced by verify-widget-contracts.sh. Missing property = fail (not just wrong value). Minimums are tuned to the platform's 14px root font-size (html { font-size: 0.875rem }): 0.5rem = 7px, 0.625rem = ~9px, 0.75rem = ~11px.

.ac-input.description: Text input must be visible, clickable, readable

.ac-textarea.description: Multi-line input — same as ac-input plus min-height

.ac-btn.description: Button must be fingertip-sized, bold, distinguishable

.ac-card.description: Card must visually contain its children with spacing + border

.ac-card-body.description: Card body must have internal padding

.ac-field.description: Form field wrapper spaces fields vertically

.ac-label.description: Label must be visible above input with spacing

.ac-alert.description: Alert must stand out from page with background + padding

.act-bubble.description: Commerce-templates chat bubble: padding on all sides + background fill that visually contains its text.

.acs-bubble.description: Shared-templates chat bubble (used by AcChatPage): padding on all sides + border-radius. Background is set by .acs-bubble-mine / .acs-bubble-other variants.

.s-card.description: Generic card (AcStatsGrid, settings panel, dashboard tiles). Must have background + border so the card shape is visible.

.act-navbar.description: Top navbar shell — needs a non-transparent background AND a visible bottom border. Horizontal padding is legitimately 0 because .act-navbar-inner controls the inner margin, so don't require padding here.

.act-footer.description: Bottom footer — needs a top border or a distinguishing background to separate it from page content. Horizontal padding optional.

.ac-search.description: Search box: must contain the input within a bordered, padded shell that users can tap anywhere on.

.ac-tile.description: Category tile wrapper — vertical stack of icon circle + label. The wrapper itself is transparent; the circle (.ac-tile-icon) carries the background. Only min-height matters for the tap target.

.ac-tile-icon.description: Category tile icon circle — pill-shaped filled with a tinted brand colour.

.ac-space.description: Listing / space preview card. Must visually contain image + body with border and radius.

.ac-space-body.description: Space card body — padding so text doesn't touch image edge.

.ac-hero.description: Hero banner — must have a solid brand background + rounded corners + internal padding so the title reads against a visible surface.

.ac-cta.description: CTA card — icon + title + subtitle; needs bold background, internal padding, rounded corners, and fingertip-sized min-height.

.ac-action.description: Quick-action tile — large tappable card; needs background, padding, rounded corners, and min-height.

.ac-chip.description: Filter chip — pill-shaped button with toggleable active state. Needs visible bounds + tap target.

.ac-sort-select.description: Sort dropdown — native select styled to match inputs.

.ac-viewtoggle-btn.description: View-toggle button — icon inside a bordered group; parent .ac-viewtoggle carries the visible frame, so individual buttons are transparent until active.

.ac-sheet.description: Bottom sheet — slides from viewport bottom; must have surface + rounded top corners + shadow.

.ac-modal.description: Modal dialog — centred surface with header/body/footer; needs visible frame.
